assessor_1_raw: Forward-fill for weather up to 6 hours is appropriate for rare missing values in ISO data. Standard practice. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Block bootstrap with 24-hour blocks preserves daily temporal autocorrelation structure. Appropriate for hourly electricity price data with strong intra-day patterns. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: 30-50 random search configurations for each model ensures comparable exploration of hyperparameter space. Verdict: defense_wins.
